calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Katy Independent School District in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Wednesday, August 12, 2026. New Katy ISD families often don't realize how quickly the first break arrives: a student holiday on September 18 comes just five weeks in, followed by Fall Break (October 9–13) about eight weeks after school starts. The fall calendar is denser with breaks than most Texas districts — plan August childcare expecting a regular routine, but mark September and October on your calendar before the year begins.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2026-2027 for Katy Independent School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Katy ISD Spring Break runs March 8–12, 2027. Good Friday and Easter Monday are a separate student and staff holiday — March 26–29, 2027 — two full weeks later. The two breaks don't overlap. A trip planned around "Spring Break week" won't cover Easter weekend, and vice versa; check both windows before booking travel or arranging childcare.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Katy Independent School District in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Wednesday, May 26, 2027, with early dismissal. The school year runs 172 instructional days — fewer than the 175 or 180 days most Texas districts schedule, achieved through extended daily instructional minutes. The shortened day count means Katy ISD's year ends about a week earlier than many neighboring Houston-area districts.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Katy ISD winter break 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break runs December 21, 2026 through January 1, 2027. The first day of spring semester classes is Tuesday, January 5 — not Monday, January 4, which is a student holiday. Return-from-holiday travel should be planned for Sunday, January 3; the school bus runs Tuesday morning.

yearNumbers.label: Fall Break Added
yearNumbers.detail: Oct 9–13 full-week fall break is new for 2026–2027 — no structured fall break appeared in the 2025–2026 calendar.

yearNumbers.label: Ends Later
yearNumbers.detail: Last day moves from May 21 to May 26 vs 2025–2026.

yearNumbers.label: Good Friday + Easter
yearNumbers.detail: Good Friday and Easter Monday are both school holidays, creating a four-day break separate from Spring Break — two distinct holiday windows in March.

events.name: Early Dismissal and End of Fall Semester
Early Dismissal and Last Day of School

calendarNotes: Katy ISD begins the 2026–2027 school year on August 12, 2026. Fall Break runs October 9–13, Thanksgiving Break runs November 23–27, and Winter Break extends from December 21 through January 1. Students return for the spring semester on January 5, 2027. An additional student and staff holiday is observed March 26–29 following Spring Break. The school year ends with early dismissal on May 26, 2027. The calendar includes 172 instructional days and enough instructional minutes to cover two bad-weather days.
